criteria.description: Contract Registry schema + manifest + typed loader (generalized from compat/registry.py)
criteria.notes: 1:1 generalization of the shim chain confirmed

criteria.description: doctor contracts validator — enforcing well-formedness; rejects file:line (NFR-003)
criteria.evidence: WP01: spec-kitty doctor contracts; _reject_positional_anchors rejects field-name + string-value forms + (WP02 f3977c2) the fragment-join reconstruction; all red-first proven
criteria.notes: file:line rejection proven load-bearing by mutation

criteria.description: _ratchet_keys anchoring promoted to a shared src lib; behavior-preserving
criteria.evidence: WP01: src/specify_cli/contracts/anchoring.py; _ratchet_keys re-exports; 27 ratchet+write_side tests + every importer green

criteria.description: Both adopted-sweep records seeded with discovered-then-frozen consumer sets
criteria.evidence: WP01: terminology + CLI-path-literal records, consumer sets transcribed from the sweep tests' own scope constants; terms stored as fragments (manifest doesn't self-trip)

criteria.description: Static-arm absence-sweep driver — advisory + mandatory anti-vacuity control
criteria.evidence: WP02 (3f977c2): test_retired_contracts_absent.py — advisory (green under -W error; asserts only on tmp_path/input); anti-vacuity + exemption controls bite; already flagged a real ~/.kittify residual as a warning
criteria.notes: never blocks on a live find — proven structural

criteria.description: Parity proof (set-equality) — WITHOUT retiring the enforcing gates (NFR-004)
criteria.evidence: WP03 (041d3f1): test_contract_registry_parity.py — real set-equality (planted + benign control, driver_set==gate_set) via a fabricated-repo subprocess (the gates' own _grep_for/regexes, not a source-grep); gates-still-block subprocess; enforcing gates git-diff EMPTY

negative_invariants.description: No positional file:line anchor in the contract manifest (DIR-041)
negative_invariants.evidence: grep exits 1 — the manifest uses only symbol:/literals: anchors, never a file:/line: key; the schema validator + fragment-join guard reject actual file:line anchors (red-first proven). (The only file.py:NN strings in the contracts package are docstring/comment prose describing the guard.)

negative_invariants.description: No enforcing gate removed/neutered (no enforcing->advisory downgrade); the merge-blocking terminology + path gates unchanged
negative_invariants.evidence: grep exits 1 — no suppression in the new tests; `git diff upstream/main...HEAD` on test_no_legacy_terminology.py + test_no_legacy_path_literals.py is EMPTY (enforcing gates byte-for-byte unchanged, still merge-blocking — WP03's gates-still-block subprocess proves a neuter would red).
